subject: Glimmet, a purple jellyfish-like Pokemon with crystal protrusions, floating in an underground cave filled with glowing crystal formations
description: Glimmet floats centrally in a cave environment, its round purple body trailing thin tentacle-like appendages. Crystal stalagmites and stalactites in blue, purple, and teal tones surround the creature, some glowing with an inner light. The cave setting gives the scene a deep, otherworldly atmosphere, the bioluminescent quality of both the crystals and the creature blending together. The color palette is predominantly cool purple and blue, creating an eerie but beautiful underground world.
background: Underground cave with glowing crystal stalagmites and stalactites
emotion: passive and drifting; no strong expression, serene floating posture
